## Summary

-

## Type

- [ ] feat: new feature
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] refactor: code reorganization, no behavior change
- [ ] docs: documentation only
- [ ] build/ci: tooling
- [ ] test: tests only

## Test plan

- [ ] `make ci-local` passes locally
- [ ] `make test-cov` meets the coverage gate
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated if user-facing or breaking

## Notes for reviewers

(Data-schema, ingest, MCP tool, API, CLI, or env-var contract changes and any
migration notes. Leave blank if none.)
